author: WSvX
content:
## Handoff: Per-Widget Calendar Filtering — Session 6 Update (2026-04-25)

**Status**: Branch history cleaned. Crosslink issues closed. Ready for performance work or upstream PR.

### Session 6 Cleanup Actions

- Closed crosslink #27, #28, #29, #30, #31 (3-state picker fix chain)
- Closed crosslink #11 (Room schema committed)
- Removed `CHANGELOG.md` from commit history (not part of this feature)
- Removed `values-en-rGB` rename from commit history (unrelated)
- Combined `247ec9bca` + `25b8a092c` into single commit with conventional commit message
- Deleted `crosslink/hub` remote branch
- Added crosslink rule: never push `crosslink/hub` to remote
- Build verified: `./gradlew assembleCoreDebug` passes

### Final Branch (6 commits)

```
15c170ef6 feat(widget): add 3-state calendar picker to widget config
f5e95d892 fix(widget): pre-check all calendars when default selection is used
1c136aede chore: add Room schema 12.json
4e4089a2e feat(widget): implement per-widget calendar filtering for event list widget
1bb0fd976 feat(widget): add settings icon drawable and calendar picker strings
b8cebd501 feat(widget): add calendars column and helpers to Widget model
```

### 3-State Calendar Picker Behavior

| DB `calendars` | Config Label | Widget Renders |
|---|---|---|
| `null` (default) | "All calendars selected" | Global filter events |
| `""` (explicit none) | "No calendars selected" + warning | No events |
| `"1,2,3"` | "N calendars selected" | Filtered to those IDs |

### Files Changed (across all 6 commits)

`models/Widget.kt`, `databases/EventsDatabase.kt`, `helpers/Constants.kt`, `helpers/EventsHelper.kt`, `helpers/MyWidgetListProvider.kt`, `adapters/EventListWidgetAdapter.kt`, `activities/WidgetListConfigureActivity.kt`, `res/layout/widget_event_list_header.xml`, `res/layout/widget_config_list.xml`, `res/drawable/ic_settings_vector.xml`, `res/drawable/ic_calendar_add_vector.xml`, `res/values/strings.xml`, `res/values/dimens.xml`, Room schema 12.json

### Remaining Open Issues (13)

| Priority | ID | Title |
|---|---|---|
| HIGH | #15 | Add missing database indexes on Event entity |
| HIGH | #16 | Fix N+1 query in EventsHelper.getEventsSync |
| HIGH | #17 | Replace notifyDataSetChanged with DiffUtil |
| LOW | #18–#26 | Performance/minor refactors |

### Known Issue

- `crosslink issue close 11` fails due to duplicate hydration warning for #19. Issue is documented as closed in comments. May need manual DB fix.

### Uncommitted Working Tree

- `ic_launcher_background.xml` — minor color tweak
- `app/src/debug/res/values-en-rGB/strings.xml` — deletion pending decision

### Next Steps

1. Performance issues (#15, #16, #17) — independent of widget work
2. Manual testing per design doc section 5.5
3. Final lint + build before upstream PR
4. Decide fate of uncommitted working tree files
